localizations.title: Kilea's Wrath
localizations.hiddenObject_1: Follow the footprints to see where they lead you.
localizations.hint_13_first: Imagine tracing the paths as they are described.
localizations.hint_13: There are two parts to this puzzle. The hero first takes one path, then follows a separate, more complex path. What do these paths look like?
localizations.hint_19: We have only one option: we need to smash down the door to get into the prophetess' house.
localizations.hint_24: Your hammer can be used to smash and break things.
localizations.hint_77: Refer to the instructions on card 77, as well as those on the map inside the box.
localizations.hint_8: An object designed to illuminate the Forbidden Underground and to repel evil creatures.
localizations.hint_97_first: You can see footprints on the ground at your feet.
localizations.hint_97: Using the map you created with the cards, you can now follow the footprints, starting at your current location.
localizations.hint_23: Two pieces of the rope can be joined to form a number.
localizations.hint_12: The rope will allow you to continue your journey.
localizations.hint_64: With the bridge gone, you'll need to find another way to cross to the other island.
localizations.hint_76: Make sure to add the card on the map.
localizations.hint_30: The lighthouse is dark; you need a flame to light it.
localizations.hint_61: The creature from the Forbidden Underground cannot stand bright lights.
localizations.hint_69: Make sure to add the card to the map.
localizations.hint_9_first: Dodge the falling fireballs one after the other.
localizations.hint_9: If you dodge them starting with the closest one and progressing to the furthest one, you will draw a shape.
localizations.hint_4_first: Push the boulders out of the way to open a pathway to the other side of the bridge.
localizations.hint_4: There is only one possible pathway; begin by trying to go upwards.
localizations.hint_35_first: The map you have assembled shows 4 statues identical to those found on the broken stone slab.  By drawing lines between the statues, you will find the entrance to the Forbidden Underground.
localizations.hint_35: One of the statues is partially obscured by the smoke, but a portion of that statue is visible on another card. Draw lines connecting them and use card 11 to find the correct entrance.
localizations.hint_14: The lantern could guide you with its flame to help you reach the other island.
localizations.hint_15: This drawing will help you escape the Forbidden Underground. Some of the features on the drawing are similar to those on the assembled map of the Forbidden Underground.
localizations.hint_33_first: Align the compass on the map so that it points north, then use the lighthouse to guide you.
localizations.hint_33: You have three directions you can choose from, but only one of them will lead you safely through the reefs; the others will lead you into danger.
localizations.hint_49: Make sure to add the card to the map.
localizations.hint_26: You'll need to break this boulder.
localizations.hint_60: In the Forbidden Underground, natural light will not be able to help you.
localizations.hint_68: Make sure to add the card to the map.
localizations.hint_32_first: Only one of the tunnel paths will lead you to your goal. You know you've seen these blue pearls somewhere before.
localizations.hint_32: To find the correct path, use the blue pearl necklace (92) that was dropped by the creature from the Forbidden Underground. It appears that the blue pearls on the cards making up the map (11, 14, 26, and 49) are related to the arrangement of the blue pearls on the necklace.
localizations.hint_48: Make sure to add the card to the map.
localizations.hint_16: Place card 16 to the left of card 82 to create a panorama.
localizations.hint_82_step_1_first: The creature from the Forbidden Underground blocks your way forward. You'll need to use Fay's light to disorient it.
localizations.hint_82_step_1: Use your device on Fay (16) and direct her light at the creature.
localizations.hint_95: Make sure to add the card to the map.
localizations.hint_94_first: The drawing on the wall depicts a statue situated somewhere within the archipelago.
localizations.hint_94: The statue lies in the northeastern part of the archipelago, but how does its location relate to the combination of the chest (86)?
localizations.hint_86_first: You need to discover the combination of the chest. Perhaps the nearby peaks have some significance.
localizations.hint_86: The drawing (94) will give you an idea of where to start as you reflect upon this puzzle.
localizations.hint_10: The sacred stone must be inserted into the stone slab at the summit of the volcano.
localizations.hint_11: To access the Forbidden Underground, you will need to make use of the broken stone slab (35).
localizations.hint_45: Make sure to add the card to the map.
localizations.hint_51: Place cards 36, 58, 70, and 80 faceup on the map to show the volcano and the various paths around it. This will allow you to find the correct path you should take.
localizations.hint_81: There is a slot in the stone slab that should fit a specific object.
localizations.hint_91_first: The three rings can be rotated, but what do the dots represent?
localizations.hint_91: The dots represent the locations of the statues throughout the archipelago.
localizations.hint_53: Make sure to add the card to the map.
localizations.hint_44: Make sure to add the card to the map.
localizations.answer_hint_13: Tracing the first path forms the number 1, and tracing the second forms the number 9. Combining both, you obtain the number 19.
localizations.answer_hint_19: To get inside, break down the door (19) using your hammer (24). 19 + 24 = 43.
localizations.answer_hint_77: When prompted to add the card to the map, you should position it in the specified location.
localizations.answer_hint_97: The footprints found at the bottom of card 97 continue along the map you've begun to assemble. Following them will lead you to the back of card 13, where you can see the hidden number 23.
localizations.answer_hint_23: The first piece of rope is shaped like a 1, and immediately to its right is another piece that looks like a 2. None of the other pieces are shaped like numbers. Combine these two pieces to get the number 12.
localizations.answer_hint_64: Since the bridge has been destroyed, the rope (12) you found will help you reach the next island (64). 12 + 64 = 76.
localizations.answer_hint_76: When prompted to add the card to the map, you should position it in the specified location.
localizations.answer_hint_61: The amulet (8) will help you drive away the creature from the Forbidden Underground (61). 8 + 61 = 69.
localizations.answer_hint_69: When prompted to add the card to the map, you should position it in the specified location.
localizations.answer_hint_9: Start with the fireball closest to you, on the right, followed by the one to your left, then the one near the top, and finally the lowest one. Tracing these in order will form the number 4.
localizations.answer_hint_4: Push the boulder to your left one space. Next, push the boulder now above you as far as you can upward. Then push the boulder to your left one space, followed by pushing the stone above you one space as well. Continue moving around the fiery debris by moving left, up, then right. Finally, push the final boulder all the way to the right to clear the path and move upward toward the exit.
localizations.answer_hint_15: Place card 15 over the part of the map featuring the Forbidden Underground. It should overlap cards 68, 60, 14, 50, and 82 so that it completes the path toward the exit. The tunnels and bridges will then form the number 45.
localizations.answer_hint_35: Using cards 35, 11, and 97, you can solve the riddle. First, use card 35 to identify the statues on the map you've assembled. The statue on the left can be found on the back of card 13; the one one right is located on card 30; and the statue at the top is on the back of card 61. The final statue is partially obscured by smoke, but you can find it on the front of card 97, which location is on the back of card 19. Next, place card 11 on the map at position B2. Connect the top and bottom statues, and the left and right statues, as indicated on card 35. The point of intersection is at +15. +15 + 11 = 26.
localizations.answer_hint_14: You obtained a lantern (14) from the fisherman (87). Use it light the lighthouse (30). 14 + 30 = 44.
localizations.answer_hint_33: Place card 33 on the map at the location where you met the fisherman. Next, orient the compass so that it points north (referring to the compass rose on the right side of the map). Find the black needle that points toward the lighthouse without crossing any reefs. The correct needle to follow is +16. +16 + 33 = 49.
localizations.answer_hint_26: Break the boulder blocking the entrance to the Forbidden Underground (26) with your hammer (24). 26 + 24 = 50.
localizations.answer_hint_60: It is very dark in the Forbidden Underground. Only the amulet (8) will enable you to illuminate your way. 8 + 60 = 68.
localizations.answer_hint_32: Using the blue pearl necklace (92) dropped by the creature, you can decipher the correct sequence to follow. By rotating the card, the groups of pearls will indicate which path you should follow. Take the passage with one pearl (+16). +16 + 32 = 48.
localizations.answer_hint_82_step_1: Use your device to scan Fay on card 16 to activate her light. Then shine her light on the creature by sliding your device over card 82, blinding and disorienting it.
localizations.answer_hint_82_step_2: Once the creature is blinded and disoriented, shake the device to cause it to fall.
localizations.answer_hint_94: The drawing of the statue will help you unlock the chest. If you look closely at the map, the matching statue is in the northeast part of the archipelago, on the back of card 61. Using the relief of the island, you can find the information you need to unlock the chest: 1 medium peak, then 2 high peaks, and finally 1 short peak.
localizations.answer_hint_86: The drawing of the statue will help you unlock the chest. If you look closely at the map, the matching statue is in the northeast part of the archipelago, on the back of card 61. Using the relief of the island, you can find the information you need to unlock the chest: 1 medium peak, then 2 high peaks, and finally 1 short peak.
localizations.answer_hint_11: Using cards 35, 11, and 97, you can solve the riddle. First, use card 35 to identify the statues on the map you've assembled. The statue on the left can be found on the back of card 13; the right one is located on card 30; and the statue at the top is on the back of card 61. The final statue is partially obscured by smoke, but you can find it on the front of card 97, which location is on the back of card 19. Next, place card 11 on the map at position B2. Connect the top and bottom statues, and the left and right statues, as indicated on card 35. The point of intersection is at +15. +15 + 11 = 26.
localizations.answer_hint_51: Place cards 36, 58, 70, and 80 on the map. Position card 70 on top of card 55 so that the paths align. Place card 80 on card 70. Position card 58 along the right edges of cards 70 and 80. Finally, place card 36 so that it overlaps cards 80, 58, and 87. Now, examine the paths that lead to the volcano's summit. Only one unblocked path leads to the summit: the one found on the right side of card 51, indicated by +30.  +30 + 51 = 81.
localizations.answer_hint_81: The sacred stone (10) must be inserted into the stone slab at the summit of the volcano (81). 10 + 81 = 91.
localizations.answer_hint_91: The dots engraved on the stone slab represent the locations of the statues throughout the archipelago. Rotate each ring until the dots align with the positions of each of the statues found on the assembled map of the islands.
localizations.machine_4: After much effort, you've made your way across the bridge.
localizations.machine_82: The creature loses its balance, causing it to fall!
localizations.machine_91: The tremors felt throughout the archipelago have abated; the volcano Kilea appears to be calming down at last!
localizations.start: Pay attention to the small circled numbers on the back of the cards. Only take the cards when prompted.
localizations.end: You have saved the archipelago! Now that Kilea has calmed down, and the flames of its anger have ceased to blaze and rain across the islands, the population has decided to return home.  The people are filled with joy and gratitude, and erect a statue in your honor, symbolizing your bravery and tenacity. You are celebrated as the first Hero of the People of the Seas: Adam!
